nasb.text: “For it is just like a man about to go on a journey, who called his own slaves and entrusted his possessions to them.

esv.text: “For     it will be like a man     going on a journey, who called his servants    and entrusted to them his property.

cnv.text: “天國又像一個人要出外遠行，就叫自己的僕人來，把產業交給他們。

ccb.text: “天国就像一个人即将远行，他召来自己的奴仆，把产业托付给他们，

csbs.text: “天国又好比一个人要出外旅行，就叫来自己的奴仆们，把他所拥有的交托给他们。
